author: driver--fix-kickoff-agent-key-not-being-published-after-creation
content: Plan: When kickoff calls agent::init with no_key=true, the new agent config has no ssh_public_key, so publish_agent_key is never called and ensure_agent_key_published also skips (no key in config). Fix: in init_worktree_agent (kickoff.rs), after creating the agent config with no_key=true, copy the parent's SSH key info into the new agent config, then call publish_agent_key to publish the parent's public key under the new agent ID.
